---
name: devrel-integration
description: "Integrating instructional design with developer relations: developer journey, segmentation, DDMU, and community learning pathways."
---

# DevRel Integration

Design must align to the developer journey: Discover → Evaluate → Learn → Build → Scale.

Considerations:
- Segment by technical filters, user role, organization type, and contributor intent.
- Map educational assets to journey stages and contribution pathways (casual vs active).
- Include community touchpoints: onboarding, contribution guides, recognition pathways.

Operational templates:
- Content map: artifact → journey stage → KPI.
- Outreach plan: channels, timing, maintainers.

## Templates

Content map (CSV):

Artifact,JourneyStage,KPI
Quickstart,Discover,Click-to-run conversion

Contributor pathway CSV:
Role,PathwayStart,OnboardingArtifact,Recognition
Casual,Docs page,One-page guide,Badge
